title: Class Schedule
description: Check out our weekly schedule and plan your week. Pick a day to see all classes. National, city (Pelotas), and state (RS) holidays are in red. Questions? Get in touch.
selectDayDescription: Choose a day to see classes. Holidays are in red.

sessionDetails.advancedFromFourthStripeWhite: From the 4th stripe on white belt
sessionDetails.sparringOnly: Only for students who already roll
sessionDetails.corujaoBasicIntermediate: Group for basic and intermediate students

formationLevels.title: Training by level and goal
formationLevels.subtitle: Our schedule is organized to respect each stage of your journey on the mat, with focused classes for each profile.

items.title: Basic
items.description: White belt up to 3 stripes. Classes focused on fundamentals and building technical confidence.

items.title: Advanced
items.description: From the 4th stripe on white belt. Classes to sharpen strategy, details, and high-level execution.

items.title: Executive
items.description: 35+. Classes with adjusted intensity, focused on longevity and steady technical growth.

items.title: Fight simulation (rolling)
items.description: Only for students who already roll. Practical application, fight reading, and live pace.

items.title: Night Owl (10 PM)
items.description: Night group for basic and intermediate students, taught by professor Matheus Pereira.

items.title: Competition
items.description: Championship preparation: high pace, simulations, and competition strategy. Colored belts only — requires solid fundamentals and fight reading.

scheduleAnchors.formationSummary: Check levels and class rules whenever you need guidance.
